name: Real World Payment
tagline: Send USD to real people via Venmo, CashApp, Zelle, and more
description: An agent skill that lets AI agents pay real people in the real world. Specify a payment provider (Venmo, CashApp, Zelle, PayPal, Wise, Revolut, etc.), recipient handle, and wallet address. The API returns a deposit address — send any stablecoin from any chain. Daimo handles bridging, the PaymentRouter takes a 30bps fee, and Peer Protocol market makers deliver fiat USD to the recipient with ZK-proven settlement.
